À propos de ce jeu

ERADICATION

Traversez des vagues de plus en plus violentes et survivez aussi longtemps que possible.

Ouvrir le jeu Dernière update Retour aux jeux
Développeur
Low Quality Interactive
Plateforme
Roblox
Genre
Shooter PvE
Statut
Online

ERADICATION is a team-based PvE shooter on Roblox where squads fight to reclaim a town overrun by Whiskorians, once-ordinary townspeople who spent too long online and changed into something else. The transformation gave them anthropomorphic, feral features: whiskers, tails, claws. Survivors coined the nickname Whiskorian as a cruel joke. The name stuck.

Players are contractors hired to push the Whiskorians back and take the town, block by block. The threat escalates as matches progress, and the mountain past the fog at the edge of the map. Whiskspire, hides something the briefings won't talk about.

Caractéristiques

  • Team-based PvE against escalating Whiskorian waves
  • Territory control across a full reclaimable town
  • Deep weapon sandbox with vehicles, helicopters, and tactical loadouts
  • Layered map with a gated frontier zone and a hidden boss encounter
  • Regular balance updates and seasonal content

Liens officiels

  • Play on Roblox
  • Latest update notes
Low Quality Interactive

On ship depuis 2024. On finit jamais.
